productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Women Solid Black Capris
description: CompositionBlack capris made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, with flattened seams, spandex for more stretch, reinforced tear points, printed main label, soft and broad elasticated waist with a drawcord, side pockets and embroidered brand logo below left pocketFitComfortWash careWash dark colours separately in warm water not more than 40 degreesUse mild detergentDo not bleach, wringFlat dry in shadeEnjoy a calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga capri. Made of pure, sweat absorbent and stretchable cotton, these capris are stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. Reinforced tear points give strength, while the grippy fabric ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. The soft waistband with a drawcord allows you to customise the fit. Team this with urban yoga t-shirts and tops for the ultimate in comfort.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8"' and hips 36"
